subject: docs(ai-notes): ban AskUserQuestion tool, add implementation plan
body:
AskUserQuestion UI overlay breaks sessions — covers context, hangs,
forces restarts. Rule added to CLAUDE.md and AI_MISTAKES.md: never use
it, list options as numbered text instead.

Also adds plan.md for the actuals-first pivot implementation.

Tags: ai-notes, process, planning
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 5
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: forecasting-pivot
Semver: patch
